headline: Here Are Wednesday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: BJ’s Wholesale Club, Centene, Cigna, Crown Castle, ETSY, Franco-Nevada, Humana, Ovintiv, X-Energy, and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading higher on the heels of the third straight day of stock declines, and there is growing apprehension that yields will go even higher and that inflation may as well. All of the major indices finished Tuesday lower, and with Q1 earnings all but over and the incoming economic data ... headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Cigna Group, Raises Price Target to $361
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Erin Wright   maintains Cigna Group (NYSE:CI) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $355 to $361.

summary: Deutsche Bank  analyst George Hill   downgrades Cigna Group (NYSE:CI) from Buy to Hold and lowers the price target from $303 to $302.

headline: U.S. Health Insurers Raise EPS Estimates After Strong Q1'26, Higher Medicare Rates
summary: Q1 proved to be a boon for many major US managed care insurers, as earnings results exceeded consensus estimates, leading to rises in stock prices and higher full-year earnings estimates.
